objective: Explore the strongest authority, doctrine, or governance-break future for the current ideation problem. Apply that branch specifically to 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
lane_strategy: Break one core assumption and test a high-novelty replacement for the current task.

model_audit.routing_basis: AAS4 ordinary FULL_PIPELINE / IDEATION default future-branch routing target.

notes: Replaced bootstrap placeholder with a real Gamma-lane critic result.
Current task claim YAML files were reviewed; no active claim collision changed the authority analysis.

evidence.note: EMA-I says Sanctum stays dark and no external identity, transport, or SDK surface may bind directly to Sanctum capability.
Enterprise is limited to bounded derivative service delivery and leased execution wrappers; open-ended invention requests and unrestricted data-plane access are forbidden.
C45 already defines leased cognition as an outer-membrane facility only, so a standalone inference layer would duplicate or bypass the existing execution-mode authority.
C45 requires policy-valid routes to fall back to native, deterministic, operator-mediated, or explicit failure paths rather than making ad hoc external calls.
C42 says no actual runtime execution may begin until a C23 lease exists; a generic inference microservice would pressure the stack toward shadow execution outside that authority split.
C39 already assigns delegated model invocation to sampling_request and sampling_result, so a new inference protocol family would duplicate canonical message authority.
C47 owns the transition from external capability to bounded native substrates without reopening runtime bridges; a persistent independent inference layer cuts against that doctrine.
T-300 fixed the supersession boundary: Alternative C artifacts are the only forward communication-design authority, so reviving a generic microservice-era forward layer is a doctrinal backslide.
C18 already prices the operating posture around C45-governed leased cognition and C47-native adaptation, so the idea does not open a new budget authority surface; it duplicates an owned one.

recommended_next_action: Reject the idea in its literal form. If the objective is worth salvaging, reframe it as an internal model-capacity control plane subordinate to C45 route governance, C42/C23 lease authority, C47 native-promotion authority, C36 membrane law, and T-300's supersession boundary.
